event: Coinbase operated automated trading programs on GDAX
reported_metric: Two Coinbase programs sometimes matched orders with one another in certain trading pairs
market_health_signal: Internal-account cross-matching can contaminate reported exchange volume

entities: Coinbase; GDAX; Crypto Facilities; CoinMarketCap; NYSE Bitcoin Index
reported_metric: Real-time and 24-hour transaction information supplied by website; API; direct transmission
market_health_signal: Exchange reporting errors can flow into benchmark and market-data products

entities: Former Coinbase employee; GDAX; Litecoin; Bitcoin; LTC/BTC
reported_metric: Six-week period of intentional matching buy and sell orders between controlled personal accounts
market_health_signal: Same-controller matching created false appearance of liquidity and trading interest
source: CFTC press release 8369-21 and CFTC order page 3

reported_metric: Employee wash trades ranged from 0.62% to 99.0% of daily volume on some days
market_health_signal: New pair launch volume can be dominated by a single account cluster

reported_metric: 6500000 USD civil monetary penalty; cease-and-desist order
market_health_signal: Regulator found false reporting and vicarious liability for wash trading
